---
name: Enhancement
about: Improve or extend existing functionality
title: "[Enhancement]"
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''

---

**Which existing functionality should be enhanced?**
Name the feature, screen, or component that already exists and should be improved or extended.

**What is the current behavior or limitation?**
Describe how it works today and why it falls short (e.g. missing option, awkward UX, performance, edge case not covered).

**Describe the enhancement you'd like**
A clear and concise description of the improvement or extension. Note that this is not a brand-new feature, but a change to something that already exists.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Other ways the existing behavior could be improved, if any.

**Additional context**
Add any other context or screenshots about the enhancement here.
